# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This repository uses GitHub Copilot. You can mention `@copilot` in issues and pull requests to get AI-powered assistance.

## Project Overview

This project converts Markdown text into Google Slides presentations using Google Apps Script (GAS). It also includes a Chrome extension component.

## Coding Guidelines

- Follow Google Apps Script conventions for `.gs` files.
- Keep functions focused and well-named.
- Prefer readability over brevity.
- Add comments for non-obvious logic.

## How to Use Copilot in This Repository

- Mention `@copilot` in issue comments to ask questions or request help.
- Mention `@copilot` in pull request comments to request code review or suggestions.
